project.name: project gabut
project.currentFocus: Role-aware roadmap learning path, granular resources, and quiz/project assessment compatibility
durableFacts: SkillPath uses Next.js App Router, Supabase Auth/RLS, and a neobrutalism UI system.
User dashboard lives at /dashboard; admin dashboard lives at /admin and is guarded by profiles.role.
Production cron sync requires CRON_SECRET via Bearer token or x-cron-secret header.

lastAchievements: Added role-specific fallback roadmaps for frontend, backend, fullstack, UI, mobile, and data analyst targets.
Expanded roadmap resources into granular task-level video/docs resources instead of broad one-video shortcuts.
Added local quiz fallback for demo roadmaps and schema-missing quiz persistence paths.
Kept roadmap final project status compatible with Supabase databases that have not applied optional final_project columns yet.
pendingIssues: Apply Supabase migration 006_learning_assessment_system.sql to persist quiz attempts and project review state fully.
Verify the roadmap page manually with a signed-in Backend Developer profile against the live Supabase project.
External learning resource links should be spot-checked in browser before a release demo.
nextBestActions: Regenerate the signed-in user's roadmap after selecting the target role to create role-specific persisted tasks.
Run Supabase migration 006 in the target project and reload /roadmap.
Smoke-test mini quiz start and submit from a frontend task and a backend task.
validationState: npm run typecheck passed on 2026-05-28 for roadmap role/quiz changes
npm run lint passed on 2026-05-28 with Next 16 deprecation warning for next lint
